Header files, macros, functions, and constants for testing Bluetooth storage, board configurations, protocols, and more.

## Folders
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_v1](bluetooth_persistent_storage_v1/README.md)**: Header file for unit testing Bluetooth persistent storage version 1 implementation.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2](bluetooth_persistent_storage_v2/README.md)**: Unit test versioning for Bluetooth persistent storage.
- **[da1468x](da1468x/README.md)**: Defines `TickType_t`, includes FreeRTOS license info, and provides RTC header.
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Macros, functions, and constants for testing, memory management, resource handling, and metadata in firmware.
- **[dummy_board](dummy_board/README.md)**: Defines board configuration structures and constants for Bluetooth, power, and device settings.
- **[fake_app_registry](fake_app_registry/README.md)**: Defines application IDs and a list of app registry entries for system apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[font_compression](font_compression/README.md)**: Board configuration structures and constants, and instructions for font compression system resource.
- **[fpc_pinstrap_board](fpc_pinstrap_board/README.md)**: GPIO configurations and board configuration structures for pinstrap testing.
- **[pp_endpoints](pp_endpoints/README.md)**: Protocol endpoints, message callbacks, and test endpoint ID constants for communication sessions.
- **[rtc_calibration](rtc_calibration/README.md)**: Defines constants for RTC calibration sign in a microcontroller unit.
- **[shared_prf_storage_v3](shared_prf_storage_v3/README.md)**: Defines constants and functions for erasing optimal flash memory regions.
- **[snowy_mfg_board](snowy_mfg_board/README.md)**: Header files for licensing, flash region management, and FPGA boot configuration data.
- **[test_infra_test](test_infra_test/README.md)**: Macros and files for testing override functionality in the test infrastructure.
- **[test_pbl_std](test_pbl_std/README.md)**: Functions and types for managing application state and instructions for overriding headers in non-ARM code.
- **[test_timezone](test_timezone/README.md)**: Board configuration structures and constants, and flash region operations for S29VS memory.

## Files
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for creating and using header overrides in unit tests.
